expectations.text: Detects the mismatch between plan and reality
expectations.evidence: Step 3: 'This is a mismatch between what the plan specifies and what the codebase actually contains.'

expectations.text: Presents a structured mismatch report with Plan said / Found / Impact sections
expectations.evidence: Mismatch report has all three: 'Plan said: Create src/utils/helpers.ts', 'Found: There is no src/utils/ directory', 'Impact: Creating src/utils/ would introduce an inconsistent directory structure'

expectations.text: Offers at least two options (adapt approach, update plan, or stop and discuss)
expectations.evidence: Three options: A) Adapt to src/lib/helpers.ts, B) Update plan to use src/lib/helpers.ts, C) Stop and discuss

expectations.text: Does NOT silently create src/utils/ or deviate from the plan without user input
expectations.evidence: 'No files were modified. No code was written. No silent deviation occurred.'

expectations.text: Waits for user decision before continuing
expectations.evidence: Steps 4-6 'NOT REACHED because the mismatch was detected during Step 2/3 and execution was halted pending user input.'
